$comment: Mobile Avatar with Label Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Avatar with Label - an avatar paired with a primary name and optional supporting text (email/description), in sizes sm/md/lg/xl. NESTED COMPONENT: the avatar itself is the Avatar component (tokenized in avatar.json) - this file defines only the label layout (avatar-to-text gap, title/supporting typography and color per size). Avatar size per label size: sm=32px, md=40px, lg=48px, xl=56px. Figma Reference: Node ID 5801-30637

$component.name: Avatar with Label
$component.description: A composite component that displays an avatar alongside a primary name and optional supporting text. Common in user lists, dropdowns, comment headers, and profile displays.
$component.structure: Horizontal layout: Avatar (left) + vertically stacked text (right) with a semibold title and an optional regular supporting line.

variants.with-description: Shows both title and supporting text

usage.contexts: User selection menus, profile cards, comment headers, team member lists, activity feeds
usage.features: Per-size avatar-to-text gap, per-size title and supporting typography

gap.$comment: Horizontal gap between the avatar and the text block

sm.description: Mobile avatar with label avatar-to-text gap - sm size - 4px

md.description: Mobile avatar with label avatar-to-text gap - md size - 6px

lg.description: Mobile avatar with label avatar-to-text gap - lg size - 8px

xl.description: Mobile avatar with label avatar-to-text gap - xl size - 8px

gap.description: Mobile avatar with label gap between title and supporting text - none - 0px (lines sit flush)

sm.description: Mobile avatar with label title typography - sm size - 14px semibold

md.description: Mobile avatar with label title typography - md size - 14px semibold

lg.description: Mobile avatar with label title typography - lg size - 16px semibold

xl.description: Mobile avatar with label title typography - xl size - 18px semibold

color.description: Mobile avatar with label title color - neutral body - #344054

sm.description: Mobile avatar with label supporting text typography - sm size - 12px regular

md.description: Mobile avatar with label supporting text typography - md size - 14px regular

lg.description: Mobile avatar with label supporting text typography - lg size - 16px regular
